summary: Completed comprehensive V2 testing of PRIBEGA luxury beauty website. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). All major frontend features functional including premium animations, video hero, navigation, language toggle, contact form end-to-end, services display with pricing, Google Maps, mobile menu, and marquee strips. Website performing at premium $40K-level standards.
passed_tests: Homepage hero video loads and plays correctly
Navigation links work to all pages (/, /about, /services, /academy, /contact, /quiz)
Services page displays all 10 service items with pricing for 4 categories
About page loads with founder photo content
Contact form end-to-end submission with success message display
Google Maps embed loads correctly on contact page
Footer social links (Instagram: pribega_brows_paphos, TikTok: pribega_brows) present
Mobile menu toggle works correctly on small viewport (390x844)
Marquee text strips visible on homepage with premium animations
All 8 homepage sections present (hero, manifesto, principles, services preview, academy preview, CTA)
Language toggle (RU/EN) switches navigation and content
Quiz page loads with 4 options for first question
Premium animations and transitions working (preloader, text reveals, image reveals)
Responsive design works on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 98% (18/18 major features working, minor language toggle edge cases)
